## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and strategic discussion between Pedro (Tavrn) and Marcel (growthx.ai) on growth strategies and marketing approaches.](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aggressive content strategy: Shift to high-volume, SEO-optimized content creation (20-40 pieces/week) to dominate search results for relevant legal terms and services](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Micro-market saturation: Focus on dominating one geographic area at a time before expanding](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Outbound strategy: Create a law firm directory to facilitate warm outreach and relationship-building](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Potential hire: Consider bringing on a fractional CMO (Branka suggested) to accelerate growth efforts](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)

## Topics

### Recent Fundraising Challenges

  - [Both experienced frustrating fundraising processes with VCs](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Positive signals don't always translate to deals closing](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Lack of transparency in VC decision-making processes](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=77.0)
  - [Considering alternative growth strategies (e.g., profitability vs. raising capital)](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### New Product Launch: Medical Record Retrieval

  - [Tavrn launching unique medical record retrieval service](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [High demand from existing customer base (law firms)](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Seeking strategies to rapidly expand awareness and adoption](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)

### Aggressive Content Marketing Strategy

  - [Shift from curated content to high-volume SEO approach](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Target 20-40 new content pieces per week](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Focus on dominating search results for relevant legal terms](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Create comparison articles, listicles, and definitional content](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Leverage growthx.ai's agentic workflows for efficient content creation](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Micro-Market Saturation Approach

  - [Concentrate efforts on dominating one geographic area at a time](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Learn and refine the acquisition process before expanding](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1136.0)
  - [Similar to Tinder's early growth strategy of campus-by-campus expansion](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)

### Outbound Marketing Strategy

  - [Create a comprehensive law firm directory](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Use directory as a reason for warm outreach](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Offer promotional opportunities to build relationships](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

### Hiring Needs

  - [Pedro seeking head of marketing or demand generation lead](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Marcel suggests fractional CMO (Branka) as potential fit](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Networking events recommended for finding marketing talent](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to message Andy and team about increasing content velocity for Tavrn](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Explore creation of law firm directory as outbound marketing tool](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [Pedro to attend breakfast meeting at growthx.ai office](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Marcel to make introduction to Branka (potential fractional CMO)](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Begin aggressive content creation focusing on medical record retrieval and related legal services](https://fathom.video/share/XbYyywwAnxnxaJXgB5DyRF5knESyi14n?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
